subtitles.original: もっと輝くよ そうだろう
subtitles.english: We will shine even brighter, right?

subtitles.original: 叫べばいい
subtitles.english: All we have to do is shout!

subtitles.original: 憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい唄
subtitles.english: A song more dazzling than our dreams, and a passionate melody...

subtitles.original: いつか耳を塞いだ
subtitles.english: Those hands that once covered our ears...

subtitles.original: その両手がきっと翼になる
subtitles.english: ...will surely become wings.

subtitles.original: そう思うんだ
subtitles.english: That's what I believe.

subtitles.original: ゆずれない衝動
subtitles.english: An unyielding impulse!

subtitles.original: 高く飛べるよ そうだろう
subtitles.english: We can fly high, can't we?

subtitles.original: 抑えられない
subtitles.english: It can't be held back!

subtitles.original: 羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
subtitles.english: Even if no one gives us permission to take flight...

subtitles.original: もう決めたよ 迷わない
subtitles.english: I've made up my mind, I won't hesitate anymore.

subtitles.original: 向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって
subtitles.english: Even the headwind is proof that we are moving forward.

subtitles.original: 君に伝えるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll convey it to you!

subtitles.original: 何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
subtitles.english: Calling your name over and over, I'll keep walking forward.

subtitles.original: 皆さん、本日は生誕祭に来てくださってありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for coming to my birthday celebration today!

subtitles.original: ソロライブ、楽しみにしててね！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to my solo live concert!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription and Translation: Rei's "Soar"**

Alright, let's get down to brass tacks. I've got a video clip of Yumesaki Rei singing "Soar," and my mission is to provide accurate, engaging subtitles. My immediate focus is on transcribing the Japanese lyrics, meticulously matching them to the timing, and then crafting an equally compelling English translation.

I'm starting at the very beginning. Here's what I've got:

*   **00:01.800 - 00:04.600**: "もっと輝くよ そうだろう" – The nuances of "We will shine even brighter, right?"
*   **00:04.600 - 00:06.800**: "叫べばいい" – The straightforward imperative of "All we have to do is shout!"
*   **00:06.800 - 00:12.600**: "憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい唄" – This is where it gets interesting, capturing the essence of "A song more dazzling than our dreams, and a passionate melody..."
*   **00:12.600 - 00:15.500**: "いつか耳を塞いだ" – The evocative "Those hands that once covered our ears..."
*   **00:15.500 - 00:19.800**: "その両手がきっと翼になる" – Followed by the hopeful "will surely become wings."
*   **00:19.800 - 00:23.000**: "そう思うんだ" – The simple conviction of "That's what I believe."
*   **00:23.000 - 00:28.000**: "ゆずれない衝動" – Emphasized is the raw feeling of "An unyielding impulse!"

Next, it's instrumental and vocalizing for a bit, so I'll put in some placeholders for that.

Then we're back to it:

*   **00:48.800 - 00:52.200**: "高く飛べるよ そうだろう" – A re-emergence of the determined tone "We can fly high, can't we?"
*   **00:52.200 - 00:54.600**: "抑えられない" – The forceful "It can't be held back!"
*   **00:54.600 - 01:00.000**: "羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても" – Addressing the possible opposition: "Even if no one gives us permission to take flight..."
*   **01:00.000 - 01:02.800**: "もう決めたよ 迷わない" – Concluding with the unhesitating resolve "I've made up my mind, I won't hesitate anymore."
*   **01:02.800 - 01:10.500**: "向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって" – Putting in the inspirational thought "Even the headwind is proof that we are moving forward."
*   **01:10.500 - 01:15.500**: "君に伝えるんだ" – Focusing on the audience: "I'll convey it to you!"

More vocalization, and then...

*   **01:18.000 - 01:26.500**: "何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく" – This final thought, repeated, with the lyrics: "Calling your name over and over, I'll keep walking forward."

The song ends with more instrumental. Then there's some talking, which I have to consider:

*   **01:31.600-01:36.200**: "皆さん、本日は生誕祭に来てくださってありがとうございました！" – Which gets the translation, "Thank you all so much for coming to my birthday celebration today!"
*   **01:36.500 - 01:39.500**: "ソロライブ、楽しみにしててね！" – To give the message: "Please look forward to my solo live concert!"
*   **01:39.800 - 01:42.500**: "バイバーイ！" – Finishing with a simple "Bye-

ルイ友へ

To Rui-tomo:
Thanks to everyone's support, I can finally do a solo live! Thank you so much! ♡

subtitles.original:
もっともっと夢にむかって光り輝く階段をのぼって、
いろんな景色をみせてね☺
subtitles.english:
Climbing up the shining stairs towards our dreams,
I'll show you many different sights! ☺

subtitles.original:
私の物語には君が必要です！！これからもよろしくね!!
[2026.06.11]
subtitles.english:
You are absolutely necessary for my story!!
I look forward to being with you from now on! [2026.06.11]

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription and Translation Analysis: Yumesaki Rei "Soar" Performance**

Okay, so I've got this video segment of Yumesaki Rei's live performance of "Soar," and the immediate need is to provide accurate subtitles. My first instinct is always to dive in and transcribe, focusing on precise timing and clear translation. I need to capture both the sung lyrics and any spoken words or on-screen text.

My process starts with audio analysis, meticulously noting the start and end times of each phrase, and matching it to my transcription. I began by dissecting the audio:

*   **00:00 - 00:02.000:** Instrumental intro.
*   **00:02.000 - 00:07.100:** "もっと輝くよ そうだろう 叫べばいい" (We will shine even brighter, right? Just scream it out!) - *This is a strong opening, setting the tone.*
*   **00:07.100 - 00:13.000:** "憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい唄" (A song more dazzling than longing, and a fierce song) - *The lyrics are getting more intense.*
*   **00:13.000 - 00:18.000:** "いつか耳を塞いだ その両手が" (Those hands that once covered your ears)
*   **00:18.000 - 00:23.700:** "きっと翼になる そう思うんだ" (will surely become wings, that's what I believe.)
*   **00:23.700 - 00:29.000:** "ゆずれない衝動" (This unyielding impulse!) - *That word choice shows a strong personal feeling.*
*   **00:29.000 - 00:49.000:** Vocalizations - *I'll transcribe vocalizing as well, even if it is just "Wow..."*
*   **00:49.000 - 00:54.600:** "高く飛べるよ そうだろう 抑えられない" (We can fly high, right? I can't hold it back!)
*   **00:54.600 - 01:00.300:** "羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても" (Even if no one gives us permission to take flight,) - *That phrase reflects personal strength and defiance.*
*   **01:00.300 - 01:03.200:** "もう決めたよ 迷わない" (I've already decided, I won't hesitate anymore.)
*   **01:03.200 - 01:10.800:** "向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって" (Even a headwind is surely proof that we're moving forward.)
*   **01:10.800 - 01:15.500:** "君に伝えるんだ" (I will convey this to you!)
*   **01:15.500 - 01:18.200:** Vocalization - Wow
*   **01:18.200 - 01:26.500:** "何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく" (I will call your name over and over as I keep walking forward.)
*   **01:31.500 - 01:36.700:** "皆さん、本日は生誕祭に来てくださってありがとうございました！" (Everyone, thank you so much for coming to my birthday festival today!)
*   **01:36.700 - 01:39.700:** "ソロライブ、楽しみにしててね！" (Please look forward to my solo live concert!)
*   **01:39.700 - 01:44.000:** "バイバーイ！" (Bye-bye!)

Then, I noticed something interesting. From 01:45 onwards, there's a visual text element. It's crucial to subtitle this as well, because it's part of the video. It is also important to consider the original language text.

Let's transcribe and translate:

*   **01:45.000 - 01:54.000:** "ルイ友へ みんなの応援のおか
